awesomeList.descriptionHTML: 📶 A curated list of awesome ESP8266/32 projects and code
awesomeList.description: 📶 A curated list of awesome ESP8266/32 projects and code

nodes.itemHTML: • Tuya-Convertstars3k - A Wi-Fi firmware flasher ESP8266 that has been pre-loaded with Tuya firmware.
• Tasmotizerstars733 - A graphical flashing tool for Tasmota firmware. Can manage Wi-Fi & MQTT settings, modules & templates.
• Tasmota - An alternative firmware for Sonoff & other ESP8266/ESP32 devices. Includes a large collection of sensor drivers & integrates with Home Assistant natively or via MQTT.
• Sming Frameworkstars1.2k - Superb C/C++ IoT Framework with support for ESP8266 and ESP32.
• Open SmartWatch - A FOSS smartwatch with GPS, an inertial unit and an extremely cool 3D-printed case.
• Dhyarastars2 - A C/C++ library for making a Mobile Ad hoc Network (MANET) using ESP Now.
• Meshtastic - ESP32 LoRA boards as secure, long battery life, mesh GPS communicators.
• Disaster Radio - A disaster-resilient communications network powered by the sun
• ESP32-Paxcounterstars863 Wifi & Bluetooth driven, LoRaWAN enabled, battery powered mini Paxcounter built on cheap ESP32 LoRa IoT boards
• CanAirIO SensorLibstars7 - ESP32/8266 library with auto-configuration of multiple PM2.5, CO2 and environment sensors.
• CanAirIOstars38 - Citizen science project that uses mobile and fixed stations to measure air quality with ESP32 and smartphones.
• go-mcustars8 - Golang package for interacting with NodeMCU-based boards.
• MicroPythonstars12.5k - An implemention of Python3 for the ESP8266 and 32.
• painlessMeshstars399 - A library that takes care of the particulars of creating a simple mesh network using ESP8266 and ESP32 hardware.
• WifiEspNowstars91 - Arduino library for ESP-NOW, a connectionless WiFi communication protocol defined by Espressif.
• ESP32Marauderstars269 - An integrated suite of offensive and defensive tools for WiFi and Bluetooth.
• ESPTool-ckstars336 - A CLI tool for flashing in the ESP8266.
• ESPTool-guistars115 - A flashing GUI tool based on ESPTool-ck.
• NodeMCU Flasherstars1.5k - NodeMCU's official flashing tool for its OS.
• LuaNodestars645 - A lua-only SDK for 32/8266.
• OpenMQTTGatewaystars2.2k - An implementation of a multiprotocol MQTT gateway for both ESP's among other devices.
• ESPHome - A full-featured system for controlling ESP's through simple yet powerful configuration files and Home Automation systems.
• Sonoff-Homekitstars748 - An alternative firmware for Sonoff devices (and other 8266 devices) which allows control through Apple's Homekit.
• DoorsignEPDstars78 - A smart... doorsign with an E-Paper display using the ESP32.
• EPaperWeatherDisplaystars89 - A very cute e-ink weather display using the ESP32.
• SuperGreenOSstars57 - A full-featured home farming automation software for the ESP32.
• ESP32-BLECollectorstars148 - A wardriving device which displays BLE devices and collects data from them, all in a nice screen interface.
• ArduinoPcapstars285 - A library which allows generation of .pcap files with network traffic, for both ESP's.
• WiFi Satellite - A giant Wifi "satellite" that can monitor all 14 2.4Ghz channels using, well, 14 ESP32s.
• ESP8266 Deautherstars8.2k - A very cool pseudojammer (deauther) of Wifi networks that uses the ESP8266.
• PacketMonitorstars238 - A beautiful OLED monitor for packet activity in a WiFi channel. Two versions for each ESP.
• WiFiDuckstars796 - A wireless-enabled keystroke injector, analogous, but even more awesome than the Rubber Ducky.
• ESP8266 Beacon Spamstars590 - Want to confuse people? This device creates hundreds of fake WiFi networks.
• DeauthDetectorstars420 - A small device that shines a light if it detects a WiFi deauth attack. Made by the same guy as the last six projects.
• HeartyPatch - A wearable BLE and WiFi connected ECG-HR patch which uses the ESP32.
• HealthyPi v4 - An amazing open source vital signs monitor that can monitor ECG, respiration, pulse oximetry and body temperature, all run by an ESP32.
• SoftRFstars337 - A DIY aviation proximity awareness system that can be used in UAV projects.
• Retro ESP32stars327 - An extremely cool launcher for the Odroid Go (with the ESP32), which allows emulating several retro consoles.
• PedalinoMinistars158 - A wireless MIDI pedal controller for guitarists, built with the ESP32.
• StickWatchstars68 - A smartwatch module based on the M5Stick, using the ESP32.
• DroneBridgestars76 - An implementation of DroneBridge, a signal link for drones and UAV's on the ESP32.
• Wasm3stars3.6k - A lightning fast WebAssembly interpreter designed for embedded devices, compatible with both ESP's.
• ESP-Dashstars582 - Beautiful and fast framework for creating remote dashboards in the 8266/32. No internet required.
• GUIslicestars565 - A drag and drop GUI framework for several devices and screen controllers. Compatible with 8266 and 32.
• MicroWebSrv2stars322 - A very powerful MicroPython web server which can be used in the ESP32.
• TTSstars120 - A somehow good text to speech library for several Arduino devices, both ESP's included.
• Koynstars56 - A decentralized Bitcoin library for the ESP32 and the ESP8266.
• UTFT-ESPstars82 - UTFT Support for the ESP32/8266.
• TinyGSMstars1.2k - A quick and simple Arduino library for interaction with GSM modules which can also control the 8266 through AT commands.
• mJSstars1.5k - A lightweight and restricted JS engine that is used by MongooseOS, compatible on the 32 and 8266.
• ESPUIstars358 - A simply library for making interactive web interfaces for both ESP's.
• ESP32 ePaperstars152 - A full-featured library for using ePaper modules with the ESP32.
• TinyUPnPstars72 - A lightweight UPnP IGD library for automatic port forwarding on the 8266 and 32.
• Esp32SSHClientstars18 - A library that implements a SSH client in the ESP32.
• MongooseOSstars2.1k - An IoT specific firmware, with both C and JS. Available for the ESP32/8266.
• ESP8266Wifistars407 - Simple Arduino Wifi library for the 8266.
• ESPBasic - A BASIC firmware for easy and wireless programming, ready for the 8266.
• NodeMCUstars6.6k - An eLua-based firmware for the ESP8266.
• RT-Threadstars5.7k - Chinese open source firmware available for the ESP32.
• PlatformIOstars5.1k - Cross Platform IDE and Debugger that supports both the ESP32 and ESP8266.
• Homie8266stars1.2k - Framework implementation of the Homie protocol for the 8266.
• ESP_mqttstars1.1k - MQTT helper library for the ESP8266.
• IRremoteESP8266stars1.7k - Emit and receive IR signals in the ESP8266.
• esphomelibstars546 - Framework to integrate with HomeAssistant in the 8266.
• Free802.11stars378 - Library to emit arbitrary 802.11 signals with the ESP32.
• TFTLibrarystars398 - TFT compatibility for the ESP32.
• ESPAudiostars1k - Library for playing a diverse range of audio formats in the ESP8266/ESP32.
• AsyncTCPstars525 - Asynchronous TCP Library for both the 8266 and the 32.
• ESP-HomeKitstars750 - Homekit implementation for 8266 on RTOS.
• ESPHelperstars314 - MQTT and Wi-fi automation-oriented library for the 8266.
• ESPHelper/32stars53 - Port of the ESPHelper library for the 32.
• WiFiESPstars448 - Arduino library for Wifi management, client/server for 8266 board.
• DeviceHive - A firmware made as a client for DeviceHive's IoT data platform, only for the 8266.
• ESP Flash Tool - The vanilla firmware flasher for both ESP's.
• Arduino Core/8266stars12.9k - The Arduino core for the ESP8266.
• Arduino Core/32stars6.7k - The other Arduino core for the ESP32.
• ESPToolstars3.8k - Espressif's command line tool for bootloader comms in both ESP's.
• ESP-Open-SDKstars1.9k - An open SDK for the ESP8266.
• Arduino FS Pluginstars562 - An Arduino plugin for filesystem uploads in the 8266.
• ESP32stars1k - An experimental firmware for 3D Printers, both the ESP32 and 8266.
• Espressif AT - The default vanilla firmware for the ESP8266.
• Frankensteinstars304 - A quick and dirty firmware with cool features for the ESP8266.
